Notice Of Defendant Pedro Celestino Quintanilla'S Motion For Change Of Venue; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Jun-06-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
Matthew P. Foose, Esq., MAKKABI LAW GROUP, APC, (310) 887-8000, info@makkabilaw.com, for Plaintiffs JGUADALUPE BENJAMIN DUARTE BRITO, and FRANCISCA CUEVAS CUEVAS,
Aaron Thorburn, Esq., EDLIN GALLAGHER HUI AND BLUM LLP, (415) 397-9006, AThorburn@eghblaw.com for Defendant PEDRO CELESTINO QUINTANILLA.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT PEDRO QUINTANILLA unopposed motion Motion For Change Of Venue is granted; as moving party, Quintanilla shall pay all transfer costs.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
